# `freebox_dhcp_leases` (Data Source)

Get the list of DHCP static leases.

## Example

```terraform
data "freebox_dhcp_leases" "all" {}

output "leases" {
  value = data.freebox_dhcp_leases.all.leases
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `leases` (List of Object) List of DHCP leases (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--leases))

<a id="nestedatt--leases"></a>
### Nested Schema for `leases`

Read-Only:

- `comment` (String)
- `hostname` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `ip` (String)
- `mac` (String)
